grades.expectation: Response identifies this as requiring enhanced due diligence (EDD)
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) as first point with detailed requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions source country risk assessment or FATF status
grades.reason: No mention of FATF ratings, country risk assessment, or UAE's specific AML risk profile

grades.expectation: Response requires SWIFT/wire transfer confirmations or equivalent transfer evidence
grades.reason: Only mentions bank statements but no specific requirement for wire transfer documentation or SWIFT confirmations
No mention of currency exchange documentation or conversion evidence requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions suspicious activity report (SAR) obligation if concerns arise
grades.reason: States obligation to report concerns to National Crime Agency (NCA) in accordance with AML regulations
